author: Avigyan Sinha
name: SP8192 MuonTTT WeightTied Recurrence — RoPE + RMSNorm + LeakyReLU²
blurb: SP8192 tokenizer + weight-tied recurrent transformer (1 shared block × 4 steps, dim=512, 8h) + Muon (2D) + Adam (emb/norms). Features: RMSNorm, RoPE, LeakyReLU(0.5)², logit softcap 30, SDClip int8+zlib. TTT (3 SGD steps on ln_f+block.norm, lr=3e-4) at eval. 1×H100 SXM, ~1227 steps in 10 min. Seed 2025: val_bpb=1.4305. Seeds 1337 and 42 pending.
